description: Version bump to v7.7.0 and comprehensive documentation update (README.md, README_EN.md, CHANGELOG.md)
steps: Update version from 7.6.0 to 7.7.0 in: (1) pyproject.toml [project] version. (2) dashboard/app.py FastAPI version string. (3) dashboard/app.py all 'v7.6.0' references in templates/responses. (4) dashboard/templates/base.html version display and CSS cache busting params. (5) dashboard/static/css link references.

Update docs/CHANGELOG.md: Add v7.7.0 section at the top with all new features: portfolio management, earnings tracking charts, persona deep interaction (ask/compare), notification cron optimization, UI polish (table sorting, consistency), dashboard data enrichment (sectors, movers, breadth), report professional visualization + download.
Update README.md: (1) Change version badge to v7.7.0. (2) Add v7.7.0 features table. (3) Ensure all new routes (/portfolio, /report/{ticker}) are documented. (4) Update the feature list.
Update README_EN.md: Same as README.md but in English.
Commit all changes with message: 'docs: 升级至v7.7.0+更新文档和CHANGELOG'
acceptance_criteria: README.md and README_EN.md reflect new features
verification: grep -r '7.6.0' pyproject.toml dashboard/app.py dashboard/templates/base.html returns no results (all updated to 7.7.0)
